name: ExtensionActorDefinition_Reference
title: R5: Reference to more information about the actor (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ActorDefinition.reference` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ActorDefinition.reference` 0..* `url`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `ActorDefinition.reference` 0..* `url`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ActorDefinition.reference` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ActorDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `ActorDefinition.reference` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Reference to more information about the actor (new)
element.comment:

element.short: Reference to more information about the actor
element.definition: A reference to additional documentation about the actor, but description and documentation.
